items.prompt: for file in *.log; do … done typically…
choices: Runs the loop body once per matching file
items.explain: A for loop iterates over the expanded list (here, *.log files).

choices: The path exists and is a regular file
items.explain: -f is the test for an existing regular file.

items.prompt: case … esac is often clearer than a long if/elif chain when matching one variable against several patterns.
items.explain: case is the usual multi-way branch for one value.
The :- form supplies a default when the parameter is unset or empty.
